evals.prompt: Add ID Capture to my Flutter app so I can scan passports, driver's licenses and national ID cards and read the holder's name and date of birth. Here's my screen file: EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill writes a complete ID Capture integration: plugin init in main(), context with license key, IdCaptureSettings with acceptedDocuments and a FullDocumentScanner wrapped in IdCaptureScanner, IdCapture + IdCaptureListener (didCaptureId/didRejectId), DataCaptureView + IdCaptureOverlay, recommended camera settings, and a camera lifecycle via WidgetsBindingObserver. Setup checklist included.

assertions.text: await ScanditFlutterDataCaptureId.initialize() is called in main before runApp
'-- ENTER YOUR SCANDIT LICENSE KEY HERE --' is present
settings.acceptedDocuments is configured with document objects like Passport, DriverLicense, IdCard (semantic)
Setup checklist mentions NSCameraUsageDescription for iOS (semantic)
settings.scannerType is NOT used in the final code (semantic)

evals.prompt: I only need to read the PDF417 barcode on the back of US driver's licenses — nothing else. Set up ID Capture for that in EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill accepts only DriverLicense for the US region and uses a SingleSideScanner with only the barcode flag enabled, wrapped in IdCaptureScanner.

assertions.text: the SingleSideScanner enables only the barcode flag, i.e. SingleSideScanner(true, false, false) (semantic)

evals.prompt: Set up ID Capture to scan passports and extract the MRZ data (full name, document number, date of expiry). Use EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill accepts Passport, uses a scanner that reads the MRZ (FullDocumentScanner or SingleSideScanner with machineReadableZone enabled), and reads fields from the captured id / mrz result.

assertions.text: the scanner reads the MRZ, via FullDocumentScanner or a SingleSideScanner with machineReadableZone enabled (semantic)
capturedId.mrz is referenced or MRZ fields are read from the captured id (semantic)

evals.prompt: Add ID Capture but anonymize sensitive data — I don't want document images or sensitive fields in the result. Use EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill sets IdCaptureSettings.anonymizationMode to an IdAnonymizationMode value that covers fields and images.

assertions.text: an anonymization mode covering fields and images is chosen, e.g. IdAnonymizationMode.fieldsAndImages (semantic)

evals.prompt: I need the cropped document image and the face image back from each scanned ID. Set that up in EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill enables image extraction via setShouldPassImageTypeToResult for IdImageType.face and IdImageType.croppedDocument and reads capturedId.images.

evals.prompt: We want to reject voided / cancelled US driver's licenses during ID Capture. How do I enable that? My screen is EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds the scandit_flutter_datacapture_id_voided_detection package, sets settings.rejectVoidedIds = true, and handles RejectionReason.documentVoided in didRejectId.

assertions.text: the scandit_flutter_datacapture_id_voided_detection package is added as a dependency (semantic)

evals.prompt: We scan European driving licenses and need the vehicle categories from the back of the card. Set up ID Capture for that in EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds the scandit_flutter_datacapture_id_europe_driving_license package, sets settings.decodeBackOfEuropeanDrivingLicense = true with a scanner that reads the back, and reads capturedId.viz.drivingLicenseDetails.drivingLicenseCategories.

assertions.text: a scanner that reads the back of the card is used, e.g. FullDocumentScanner (semantic)
the scandit_flutter_datacapture_id_europe_driving_license package is added as a dependency (semantic)

evals.prompt: Add forged-barcode detection for US driver's licenses (AAMVA) to my ID Capture setup so we can flag likely-forged IDs. Use EmptyPage.dart.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds the scandit_flutter_datacapture_id_aamva_barcode_verification package, sets settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes = true, and/or reads capturedId.verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification with AamvaBarcodeVerificationStatus. It does NOT use a standalone AamvaBarcodeVerifier class (removed on Flutter).

assertions.text: verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification is referenced, or RejectionReason.forgedAamvaBarcode is handled (semantic)
AamvaBarcodeVerificationStatus is referenced when inspecting the result (semantic)
the scandit_flutter_datacapture_id_aamva_barcode_verification package is added as a dependency (semantic)
a standalone AamvaBarcodeVerifier class is NOT used in the code (semantic)

evals.prompt: How should I handle the case where a document is detected but can't be captured? I want to show the user a clear message. My screen is EmptyPage.dart and I accept passports and driver's licenses.
evals.expected_output: The skill implements didRejectId and maps RejectionReason values (timeout, notAcceptedDocumentType, etc.) to user-facing messages, disabling capture while the message is shown.

assertions.text: rejection reasons are mapped to user-facing messages, e.g. via a switch on RejectionReason (semantic)
idCapture.isEnabled is set to false while the rejection message is shown (semantic)
